issues.description: Condition should check if Leader has {Egghead} type, not just if Leader exists on board. Current condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Leader' is incorrect. Should use 'LeaderHasType' with type 'Egghead'.
Filter is incomplete. Must include cardType 'Character' and keyword 'Trigger' in addition to maxCost. Current filter only specifies cost constraint.
